title: VCU Video Decoder Incompatibility with QCAP SDK (Petalinux 2023.2)
description: The Video Codec Unit (VCU) hardware-accelerated decoder integrated into Petalinux 2023.2 is exhibiting critical compatibility failures with the proprietary QCAP SDK on the SC6F0-Dante platform. This regression disrupts video processing pipelines, necessitating a technical resolution to restore decoding functionality within the existing SDK framework.
